NRFX_SUCCESS.comment: Operation performed successfully. Base is (NRFX_ERROR_BASE_NUM=0x0BAD0000); SUCCESS is plain 0

NRFX_ERROR_INVALID_STATE.comment: 0x0BAD0000 + 5 - Invalid state, operation disallowed in this state

NRF_GPIO_Type.description: GPIO Port (P0/P1). Famous 0x504 OUT offset reproduced via leading RESERVED array.

RESERVED0.comment: 0x000-0x500 reserved (321 words) to place OUT at 0x504

OUTSET.comment: 0x508 Set individual bits in GPIO port

OUTCLR.comment: 0x50C Clear individual bits in GPIO port

DETECTMODE.comment: 0x524 Select between default DETECT and LDETECT behaviour

RESERVED1.comment: 0x528-0x6FC reserved (118 words) to place PIN_CNF at 0x700

PIN_CNF.comment: 0x700 Configuration of GPIO pins (one word per pin)

NRF_UARTE_Type.description: UART with EasyDMA (UARTE0/UARTE1). TASKS/EVENTS layout with offset-preserving RESERVED arrays.

TASKS_FLUSHRX.comment: 0x02C Flush RX FIFO into RX buffer

RESERVED1.comment: 0x030-0x0FF reserved (52 words) to reach EVENTS_CTS at 0x100

EVENTS_RXDRDY.comment: 0x108 Data received in RXD (but not transferred to RAM yet)

EVENTS_RXSTARTED.comment: 0x14C UARTE has started to receive data

EVENTS_TXSTARTED.comment: 0x150 UARTE has started to transmit data

RESERVED7.comment: 0x15C-0x1FF reserved (41 words) to reach SHORTS at 0x200

SHORTS.comment: 0x200 Shortcuts between local events and tasks

RESERVED8.comment: 0x204-0x2FF reserved (63 words) to reach INTEN at 0x300

RESERVED9.comment: 0x30C-0x47F reserved (93 words) to reach ERRORSRC at 0x480

RESERVED10.comment: 0x484-0x4FF reserved (31 words) to reach ENABLE at 0x500

RESERVED12.comment: 0x518-0x523 reserved (3 words) to reach BAUDRATE at 0x524

BAUDRATE.comment: 0x524 Baud rate. Accuracy depends on HFCLK source selected.

RESERVED13.comment: 0x528-0x533 reserved (3 words) to reach RXD.PTR at 0x534

RXD_MAXCNT.comment: 0x538 Maximum number of bytes in receive buffer (RXD.MAXCNT)

RXD_AMOUNT.comment: 0x53C Number of bytes transferred in last transaction (RXD.AMOUNT)

RESERVED14.comment: 0x540 reserved (1 word) to reach TXD.PTR at 0x544

TXD_MAXCNT.comment: 0x548 Maximum number of bytes in transmit buffer (TXD.MAXCNT)

TXD_AMOUNT.comment: 0x54C Number of bytes transferred in last transaction (TXD.AMOUNT)

RESERVED15.comment: 0x550-0x56B reserved (7 words) to reach CONFIG at 0x56C

CONFIG.comment: 0x56C Configuration of parity and hardware flow control

NRF_SPIM_Type.description: SPI master with EasyDMA (SPIM0/1/2/3). TASKS/EVENTS layout with offset-preserving RESERVED arrays.

RESERVED2.comment: 0x024-0x103 reserved (56 words) to reach EVENTS_STOPPED at 0x104

EVENTS_END.comment: 0x118 End of RXD buffer and TXD buffer reached

RESERVED6.comment: 0x124-0x14B reserved (10 words) to reach EVENTS_STARTED at 0x14C

RESERVED7.comment: 0x150-0x1FF reserved (44 words) to reach SHORTS at 0x200

SHORTS.comment: 0x200 Shortcuts between local events and tasks

RESERVED8.comment: 0x204-0x303 reserved (64 words) to reach INTENSET at 0x304

RESERVED9.comment: 0x30C-0x4FF reserved (125 words) to reach ENABLE at 0x500

RESERVED11.comment: 0x518-0x533 reserved (7 words) to reach FREQUENCY at 0x534

FREQUENCY.comment: 0x534 SPI frequency. Accuracy depends on HFCLK source selected.

RESERVED12.comment: 0x538-0x543 reserved (3 words) to reach RXD.PTR at 0x544

RXD_MAXCNT.comment: 0x548 Maximum number of bytes in receive buffer (RXD.MAXCNT)

RXD_AMOUNT.comment: 0x54C Number of bytes transferred in last transaction (RXD.AMOUNT)

TXD_MAXCNT.comment: 0x558 Maximum number of bytes in transmit buffer (TXD.MAXCNT)

TXD_AMOUNT.comment: 0x55C Number of bytes transferred in last transaction (TXD.AMOUNT)

NRF_TWIM_Type.description: I2C master with EasyDMA (TWIM0/1). TASKS/EVENTS layout with offset-preserving RESERVED arrays.

RESERVED3.comment: 0x024-0x103 reserved (56 words) to reach EVENTS_STOPPED at 0x104

RESERVED4.comment: 0x108-0x123 reserved (7 words) to reach EVENTS_ERROR at 0x124

RESERVED5.comment: 0x128-0x147 reserved (8 words) to reach EVENTS_SUSPENDED at 0x148

EVENTS_SUSPENDED.comment: 0x148 Last byte has been sent out after the SUSPEND task

EVENTS_LASTRX.comment: 0x15C Byte boundary, starting to receive the last byte

EVENTS_LASTTX.comment: 0x160 Byte boundary, starting to transmit the last byte

RESERVED7.comment: 0x164-0x1FF reserved (39 words) to reach SHORTS at 0x200

SHORTS.comment: 0x200 Shortcuts between local events and tasks

RESERVED8.comment: 0x204-0x2FF reserved (63 words) to reach INTEN at 0x300

RESERVED9.comment: 0x30C-0x4C3 reserved (110 words) to reach ERRORSRC at 0x4C4

RESERVED10.comment: 0x4C8-0x4FF reserved (14 words) to reach ENABLE at 0x500

RESERVED12.comment: 0x510-0x523 reserved (5 words) to reach FREQUENCY at 0x524

RESERVED13.comment: 0x528-0x533 reserved (3 words) to reach RXD.PTR at 0x534

RXD_MAXCNT.comment: 0x538 Maximum number of bytes in receive buffer (RXD.MAXCNT)

RXD_AMOUNT.comment: 0x53C Number of bytes transferred in last transaction (RXD.AMOUNT)

TXD_MAXCNT.comment: 0x548 Maximum number of bytes in transmit buffer (TXD.MAXCNT)

TXD_AMOUNT.comment: 0x54C Number of bytes transferred in last transaction (TXD.AMOUNT)

RESERVED14.comment: 0x554-0x587 reserved (13 words) to reach ADDRESS at 0x588

ADDRESS.comment: 0x588 Address used in the TWI transfer

NRF_TIMER_Type.description: Timer/Counter (TIMER0-4). TASKS/EVENTS layout with offset-preserving RESERVED arrays.

RESERVED0.comment: 0x014-0x03F reserved (11 words) to reach TASKS_CAPTURE[0] at 0x040

TASKS_CAPTURE.comment: 0x040 Capture Timer value to CC[n] register

RESERVED1.comment: 0x058-0x13F reserved (58 words) to reach EVENTS_COMPARE[0] at 0x140

RESERVED2.comment: 0x158-0x1FF reserved (42 words) to reach SHORTS at 0x200

SHORTS.comment: 0x200 Shortcuts between local events and tasks

RESERVED3.comment: 0x204-0x303 reserved (64 words) to reach INTENSET at 0x304

RESERVED4.comment: 0x30C-0x503 reserved (126 words) to reach MODE at 0x504

BITMODE.comment: 0x508 Configure the number of bits used by the TIMER

RESERVED6.comment: 0x514-0x53F reserved (11 words) to reach CC[0] at 0x540

NRF_RTC_Type.description: Real time counter (RTC0/1/2). TASKS/EVENTS layout with offset-preserving RESERVED arrays.

TASKS_TRIGOVRFLW.comment: 0x00C Set COUNTER to 0xFFFFF0 to trigger overflow

RESERVED0.comment: 0x010-0x0FF reserved (60 words) to reach EVENTS_TICK at 0x100

RESERVED1.comment: 0x108-0x13F reserved (14 words) to reach EVENTS_COMPARE[0] at 0x140

RESERVED2.comment: 0x150-0x303 reserved (109 words) to reach INTENSET at 0x304

RESERVED3.comment: 0x30C-0x33F reserved (13 words) to reach EVTEN at 0x340

RESERVED4.comment: 0x34C-0x503 reserved (110 words) to reach COUNTER at 0x504

RESERVED5.comment: 0x50C-0x53F reserved (13 words) to reach CC[0] at 0x540

NRF_CLOCK_Type.description: Clock management. TASKS/EVENTS layout with offset-preserving RESERVED arrays.

RESERVED0.comment: 0x01C-0x0FF reserved (57 words) to reach EVENTS_HFCLKSTARTED at 0x100

EVENTS_DONE.comment: 0x10C Calibration of LFCLK RC oscillator complete

RESERVED2.comment: 0x114-0x127 reserved (5 words) to reach EVENTS_CTSTARTED at 0x128

RESERVED3.comment: 0x130-0x303 reserved (117 words) to reach INTENSET at 0x304

RESERVED4.comment: 0x30C-0x407 reserved (63 words) to reach HFCLKRUN at 0x408

HFCLKRUN.comment: 0x408 Status indicating that HFCLKSTART task has been triggered

LFCLKRUN.comment: 0x414 Status indicating that LFCLKSTART task has been triggered

LFCLKSRCCOPY.comment: 0x41C Copy of LFCLKSRC register, set when LFCLKSTART triggered

RESERVED6.comment: 0x420-0x517 reserved (62 words) to reach LFCLKSRC at 0x518

RESERVED7.comment: 0x51C-0x537 reserved (7 words) to reach CTIV at 0x538

RESERVED8.comment: 0x53C-0x55B reserved (8 words) to reach TRACECONFIG at 0x55C

TRACECONFIG.comment: 0x55C Clocking options for the trace port debug interface

NRF_POWER_Type.description: Power control. TASKS/EVENTS layout with offset-preserving RESERVED arrays.

RESERVED0.comment: 0x000-0x077 reserved (30 words) to reach TASKS_CONSTLAT at 0x078

RESERVED1.comment: 0x080-0x107 reserved (34 words) to reach EVENTS_POFWARN at 0x108

RESERVED3.comment: 0x128-0x303 reserved (119 words) to reach INTENSET at 0x304

RESERVED4.comment: 0x30C-0x3FF reserved (61 words) to reach RESETREAS at 0x400

RESERVED5.comment: 0x404-0x427 reserved (9 words) to reach RAMSTATUS at 0x428

RESERVED6.comment: 0x42C-0x437 reserved (3 words) to reach USBREGSTATUS at 0x438

RESERVED7.comment: 0x43C-0x4FF reserved (49 words) to reach SYSTEMOFF at 0x500

RESERVED8.comment: 0x504-0x50F reserved (3 words) to reach POFCON at 0x510

RESERVED9.comment: 0x514-0x51B reserved (2 words) to reach GPREGRET at 0x51C

RESERVED10.comment: 0x524-0x577 reserved (21 words) to reach DCDCEN at 0x578

DCDCEN.comment: 0x578 Enable DC/DC converter for REG1 stage

RESERVED11.comment: 0x57C reserved (1 word) to reach DCDCEN0 at 0x580

DCDCEN0.comment: 0x580 Enable DC/DC converter for REG0 stage

RESERVED12.comment: 0x584-0x63F reserved (47 words) to reach MAINREGSTATUS at 0x640

NRF_FICR_Type.description: Factory Information Configuration Registers (read-only). nRF52840 partial layout, offset-correct.

RESERVED0.comment: 0x000-0x00F reserved (4 words) to reach CODEPAGESIZE at 0x010

CODEPAGESIZE.comment: 0x010 Code memory page size in bytes

CODESIZE.comment: 0x014 Code memory size in number of pages

RESERVED1.comment: 0x018-0x05F reserved (18 words) to reach DEVICEID[0] at 0x060

DEVICEID.comment: 0x060 Device identifier (64-bit unique device ID, low/high words)

RESERVED2.comment: 0x068-0x07F reserved (6 words) to reach ER[0] at 0x080

NRF_UICR_Type.description: User Information Configuration Registers (nonvolatile). nRF52840 partial layout, offset-correct.

RESERVED0.comment: 0x004-0x013 reserved (4 words) to reach NRFFW[0] at 0x014

RESERVED1.comment: 0x048-0x04F reserved (2 words) to reach NRFHW[0] at 0x050

RESERVED2.comment: 0x100-0x1FF reserved (64 words) to reach PSELRESET[0] at 0x200

PSELRESET.comment: 0x200 Mapping of the nRESET function (two pin assignments)

NFCPINS.comment: 0x20C Setting of pins dedicated to NFC functionality (NFC antenna or GPIO)

nrfx_uarte_config_t.description: nrfx UARTE driver configuration. Field set/order varies across nrfx versions; common nRF52 layout encoded here.

p_context.comment: User context passed to the event handler

nrfx_spim_config_t.description: nrfx SPIM driver configuration. Field set/order varies across nrfx versions; common nRF52 layout encoded here.

ss_pin.comment: Slave select pin number (NRFX_SPIM_PIN_NOT_USED to disable)

ss_active_high.comment: bool - Polarity of the SS line (true = active high)

orc.comment: Over-run character clocked out when no TX data available
